subcodes.first_line: O Imam! Verily thy letter hath come into the presence of thy Lord, the Lord of all mankind, and hath been honored by the gaze of God in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امام قد حضر کتابک لدی وجه ربک مالک الانام و تشرف بلحاظ الله فی هذا
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
